channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New York Times Connections: Today's Words, Hints, and Answers
item.description: NYT Connections game #483 words, hints, and answers. Strategies for solving yellow, green, blue, and purple groups.
item.dc:creator: marc.mclaren@futurenet.com (Marc McLaren), TechRadar

item.title: NYT Strands today — hints, answers and spangram for Sunday, October 6 (game #217)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.
item.dc:creator: marc.mclaren@futurenet.com (Marc McLaren), TechRadar

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: 'Fargo' creator: 'We've got a fight on our hands'
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta unveils Movie Gen, an AI model that can generate video with sound
item.description: Facebook owner Meta announced on Friday it had built a new AI model called Movie Gen that can create realistic-seeming video and audio clips in response to user prompts, claiming it can rival tools from leading media generation startups like OpenAI and ElevenLabs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Node.js previews network inspection support
item.description: Node.js v20.18.0, a just-introduced update to the Long-Term Support (LTS) version of the popular asynchronous, event-driven JavaScript runtime, features experimental network inspection support. Introduced October 3, Node.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The shocking rise and fall of elite cybersecurity firm IronNet
item.description: The future was once dazzling for IronNet. Founded by a former director of the National Security Agency and stacked with elite members of the U.S. intelligence establishment, IronNet promised it was going to revolutionize the way governments and corporations combat cyberattacks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange: Army, SSA and USCIS cyber chiefs on securing software through automation
item.description: Cybersecurity experts from the Army Software Factory, SSA and USCIS say letting developers drive security efforts drives up safety in code. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange: Army, SSA and USCIS cyber chiefs on securing software through automation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Civilization 7 makers work with Shawnee to bring sincere representation of the tribe to the game
item.description: The chief of the Shawnee Tribe grew up playing video games, including hundreds of hours colonizing a distant planet in the 1999 title Sid Meier’s Alpha Centauri.
item.dc:creator: Graham Lee Brewer And Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Understanding exit codes on Linux
item.description: Whenever you run a command in a Linux terminal, a numeric exit code is generated – even if you see no sign of it. The code reports the success or failure of the command. And, if the command fails, it provides a value that hints at the problem. If the exit code is 0, all is well.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google says it will stop linking to New Zealand news if a law passes forcing it to pay for content
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Google said Friday it will stop linking to New Zealand news content and will reverse its support of local media outlets if the government passes a law forcing tech companies to pay for articles displayed on their platforms.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The creepy yet helpful humanoid robot ready to move into your home
item.description: A robot that stands more than 5 feet tall and weighs 66 pounds is well-equipped for household tasks, like carrying up to 44 pounds during its run time of two to four hours.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is RPA? A revolution in business process automation
item.description: What is robotic process automation? Robotic process automation (RPA) is an application of technology, governed by business logic and structured inputs, aimed at automating business processes.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why cloud security outranks cost and scalability
item.description: According to a study by Akamai Technologies, 87% of digital-native businesses (which seems to be a term specific to Asia/Pacific) now prioritize security over cost and scalability when selecting a cloud provider.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tener prisa por alcanzar el ROI de la IA puede salir caro
item.description: Muchas organizaciones han luchado por encontrar el retorno de la inversión (ROI) después de lanzar proyectos de inteligencia artificial (IA), pero existe el peligro de exigir demasiado, demasiado pronto, según la firma de investigación y asesoramiento de TI Forrester.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google's search engine's latest AI injection will answer voiced questions about video and photos
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is injecting its search engine with more artificial intelligence that will enable people to voice questions about images and occasionally organize an entire page of results, despite the technology's past misadventures with misleading information.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: OMB gives agencies new considerations when buying AI
item.description: The Office of Management and Budget told agencies in a new memo to proactively manage AI risks, promote a competitive market and manage business processes. The post OMB gives agencies new considerations when buying AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Starlink internet service being sent to places hit by Helene
item.description: FEMA said 60 Starlink units have been sent to multiple places devastated by the hurricane, with more to come.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Justice Department takes action against Russian hacking group
item.description: U.S. officials have seized dozens of web domains used by Russian intelligence agents and their proxies to steal Americans’ information, the Justice Department announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The EU wants to know more about social media algorithms
item.description: Via the Digital Services Regulation (DSA), the European Commission has requested information from Youtube, Snapchat and Tiktok about which parameters their algorithms use to recommend social media content to users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How data brokers are fueling elder fraud in America
item.description: Criminals are increasingly turning to data brokers to provide access to private information that can be used to improve their scamming schemes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Suncor Energy derives business value through business AI and automation
item.description: By the beginning of the decade, though, its automated solution was outmoded – a troubling predicament given Suncor’s legal and regulatory obligation to charge taxes on intercompany transactions.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tres cosas que hay que hacer bien en la gestión de datos para proyectos de IA generativa
item.description: Según Kari Briski, vicepresidente de Modelos, Software y Servicios de IA en Nvidia, implementar con éxito la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa depende de la gestión eficaz de los datos y de evaluar cómo los diferentes modelos trabajan juntos para servir a un caso de uso específico.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Let your iPhone read aloud what you can't see
item.description: The new Reader Mode in iOS 18’s Magnifier app is here to help iPhone users read something small or in poor lighting. All you have to do is snap a picture.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Biden signs bill cutting environmental reviews for semiconductor industry
item.description: President Biden on Wednesday signed legislation exempting semiconductor manufacturing facilities from environmental reviews — despite objections from some Democrats and green activists who have expressed concerns about the potential for toxic waste.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, The Hill

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: CISA’s Jeff Greene on challenging the status quo
item.description: The new executive assistant director for cybersecurity at CISA details how sharing threat intelligence more broadly pays off. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: CISA’s Jeff Greene on challenging the status quo first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Bank of America is having service issues and account access problems: Downdetector
item.description: A message on the Bank of America app states, “Accounts Temporarily Unavailable. Some accounts and/or balances are temporarily unavailable.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, NewsNation

item.title: What to expect from Apple this October and beyond
item.description: The Apple product machine continues to whirr, with a host of new products, including Macs, iPads, and iPhone SE, expected to appear this fall.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals, price cuts and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Details from New Mexico's lawsuit against Snap show site failed to act on reports of sextortion
item.description: Snapchat failed to act on “rampant” reports of child grooming, sextortion and other dangers to minors on its platform, according to a newly unredacted complaint against the company filed by New Mexico's attorney general. Attorney General Raúl Torrez filed the original complaint on Sept.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KREX 5
